heroBadge: Small batch · Home kitchen · Local delivery
heroDescription: Nescafood is a small kitchen serving big, honest flavor — trays, skewers and pots made to order for parties, offices and everyday cravings.

whyUs.title: Cooked fresh, per order
whyUs.body: Nothing sits under a heat lamp. Every tray is prepared once you confirm.

whyUs.title: Local pickup & delivery
whyUs.body: Order over WhatsApp and we'll sort timing and delivery together.

whyUs.title: Built for groups
whyUs.body: Catering trays and bulk orders for offices, parties and family gatherings.

ctaHeading: Planning something? Let's cook for it.
ctaBody: Send us your headcount and date — we'll reply with a quote same day.
